channel.title: GitHub Fortran Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Fortran in GitHub

item.title: ecmwf/fckit
item.description: A Fortran toolkit for interoperating Fortran with C/C++

item.title: GEOS-ESM/MAPL
item.description: MAPL is a foundation layer of the GEOS architecture, whose original purpose is to supplement the Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF)

item.title: nasa/cea
item.description: CEA computes the equilibrium composition of mixtures via free-energy minimization, and uses the resulting product concentrations to determine thermodynamic and transport properties. It includes a large database of species with thermodynamic curve-fit data, and can be used for rocket performance, detonation parameters, and shock-wave analysis.
